name: notebook-minimap
description: Editor-beside minimap for Jupyter and VS Code native notebooks

notebookMinimap.maxColumn.description: Maximum column width reflected in the minimap. Lower values produce a thinner minimap.

notebookMinimap.renderCharacters.description: Render a block per character (true) vs. a density bar per line (false).

notebookMinimap.scale.description: Scale multiplier for the base pixel size (character width + line height).

notebookMinimap.fillPanelWidth.description: Stretch the minimap to fill the editor column width. When true, the minimap resizes with the column divider; when false, it keeps a fixed compact width and centers.

notebookMinimap.followActiveCell.description: Auto-scroll the minimap to keep the active cell in view.

notebookMinimap.includeOutputs.description: Render executed cell outputs (text + images) in the minimap.

notebookMinimap.renderMarkdownHeadings.description: Emphasize Markdown headings with larger colored bars (and tiny inline labels when there is room).

notebookMinimap.maxImageHeightRows.description: Maximum vertical size (in minimap rows) for rendered image outputs.

notebookMinimap.autoOpenOnNotebook.description: Automatically open the minimap beside a notebook the first time one becomes active in this window.

notebookMinimap.defaultWidthFraction.description: Fraction of editor-area width the minimap column takes when first opened (applied only when the resulting layout is a simple two-column split). Drag the column divider afterwards to adjust.
